name: git-safety-net
description: >- Prevent and recover from local-Git disasters — commits stranded on the wrong or unpushed branch, orphaned/dropped stashes, dangling commits about to be garbage-collected, work that seems lost after heavy branch/stash/rebase juggling or parallel-agent work, and "is everything actually merged?" uncertainty. Use whenever the user fears they lost code, asks to recover a deleted commit / branch / stash, wonders what is still unmerged, needs to prove nothing was dropped after rebasing or deleting b
author: daymade
